description: Claude Code guardrails - User-focused quality gates

core_principle.meaning: Every change must be validated from user perspective via E2E testing
core_principle.sign_off: Developer must explicitly consent before any commit

product_requirements.core_value: Generate keepsake cards and game cards from family resemblance analysis
user_sees: Personalized messages: 'I have Mum's almond-shaped eyes!'

visual_verification.description: User must see correct results in browser

developer_sign_off.consent_format: Developer explicitly confirms changes are ready

data_integrity.on_be_failure: Show error to user, never fabricate results
data_integrity.real_face_metrics_only: All analysis values must derive from actual face detection, embeddings, and attribute extraction. No synthetic, hardcoded, or fabricated values in any scoring field.

must_not_change: chemistry_label enum values and threshold mappings
shared_features must match feature_comparisons where match=true
All values derived from real face metrics only
must_not_do: Frontend must NOT call /kinship/analyze for FamiliMatch
Frontend must NOT re-compute percentage from raw scores
Backend must NOT use parent/child framing for peer comparisons
No synthetic or placeholder values in any response field

invariants: Winner always leans to a parent (never balanced) [kinship mode]
All 8 features have valid parent attribution [kinship mode]
Rich feature data for card generation [kinship mode]
All analysis values from real face metrics — no fabrication [all products]

before_any_change: 3. Get developer permission for backend changes
